name: Sky Glide
description: Sky Glide is a visually captivating sky adventure where players guide a paper plane through a serene, cloud-filled world. The goal is to soar through the bright skies, collecting floating paper planes and avoiding dangerous obstacles like spinning gears and dark void planes. With each level, the challenge increases as the sky becomes more crowded with hazards, testing your precision and reflexes. The peaceful, picturesque setting with fluffy clouds and a soft blue sky creates a relaxing and immersive experience that will keep you engaged as you aim to glide further and achieve a high score in the endless sky.
instructions: Movement Players can swipe or tilt their device to move the paper plane up down left or right guiding it through the sky Use these motions to avoid obstacles like dark paper planes and spinning gears while collecting floating paper planes and other
